response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for the Senior Fullstack Developer role. With 15+ years of software development experience and a current role explicitly involving TypeScript, Node.js, full-stack product work, and AI agent infrastructure (MCP code generators and agentic workflows), he aligns well with both the primary stack and the increasingly important AI agent requirement. His experience spans MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and React, covering most of the required technical areas. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, and Vitest/Playwright mentions, though his deep testing culture (having built testing libraries and organized TDD workshops) suggests he would adapt quickly. His ETH Zürich CS degree and breadth of domains add further credibility.
strengths: Direct alignment with primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK used in recent roles
Current role at re:cinq includes AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, directly matching the AI agent experience requirement
Exceptionally strong testing culture: built testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), organized TDD workshops, and applied TDD/CI/CD practices across multiple roles
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, which is the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin is absent from the skills list despite being a secondary tech requirement
Vitest and Playwright are not mentioned; testing experience leans toward custom D-language frameworks rather than the specified JS/TS testing stack
